TM-5.operator_signoff_summary_for_brief_revie: Lens A P3-2 (the only PII/consent concern): the anonymous apply mints an unverified-email pre-coach `User` with role=student; gated solely by anti-bot. Email never logged; confirmation response leaks no PII to anonymous caller; supabase_id is sha256 placeholder. Risk: squatting a victim's email before they sign up (TM-12 link semantics must re-verify identity). Recommended sign-off language: 'Anonymous apply mints unverified-email pre-coach accounts; gated by anti-bot. TM-12 link must re-verify identity before promoting.' Reports at handoffs/audit-reports/TM-5-re-audit-A-746c0a09.md and TM-5-re-audit-B-746c0a09.md.
